meta.title: SZL Ouroboros Thesis v18 — Formula Index
meta.note: STAGED-ADVISORY: line numbers are sampled from repo; re-verify against lake build output

entries.title: Axiom A1 — Λ Monotonicity
entries.description: If every axis improves, Λ does not decrease.

entries.title: Axiom A2 — Λ Homogeneity
entries.description: Λ(c·x) = c·Λ(x) for scalar c ≥ 0.

entries.title: Axiom A3 — Egyptian-exact diagonal normalization
entries.description: Λ(c,c,...,c) = c for all c (diagonal commitment S1). Replaces vacuous tautology flagged in PhD-Math V14-C1.

entries.title: Axiom A4 — Λ Boundedness
entries.description: min_i(x_i) ≤ Λ(x) ≤ max_i(x_i).

entries.title: TH1 — Lutar Invariant Definition
entries.description: Λ_k(x₁,...,x_k) := (∏ x_i)^(1/k) — the weighted geometric mean with unit-fraction weights.

entries.title: TH2 — Λ Bound (min/max)
entries.description: min_i(x_i) ≤ Λ_k(x) ≤ max_i(x_i). Machine-checked via Mathlib4 geometric-mean reasoning.

entries.title: TH2b — Λ Lower Bound
entries.description: min_i(x_i) ≤ Λ_k(x). Companion to TH2.

entries.title: TH10 — Uniqueness of Lutar Invariant
entries.description: Any function satisfying A1–A4 equals Λ_k (the geometric mean). Proof via Cauchy 1821 functional equation + Aczel 1966.

entries.title: TH11 — Khipu Summation-Cord Invariant
entries.description: Three-tier khipu receipt DAG: primary = Σ pendants, pendant = Σ sub-pendants. Receipt-tree coboundary integrity.

entries.title: TH12 — ΛGateLID DPO Stability
entries.description: Policy-loop rollback step is stable under DPO via Pinsker + Lipschitz composition. Three tagged sorrys: Pinsker (Mathlib), Lipschitz from Ch.9 gate boundedness.

entries.title: TH13 — Governance Head PAC-Bayes Bound
entries.description: Closed-form non-vacuous PAC-Bayes bound for governance head. Arithmetic content fully formalised; probabilistic Pr ≥ 1-δ quantifier deferred.

entries.title: R1-G1 — False Position (aha) Gate Calibration
entries.description: Egyptian aha method: for affine gate f(x) = mx+c, false_position_correct recovers target exactly from two samples.

entries.title: R3-G1 — Babylonian (Heron) Contraction
entries.description: Newton-Heron sqrt iteration is a Banach contraction on [√S,∞) with Lipschitz ≤ 1/2. Lineage hook for TH12 DPO stability.

entries.title: R4-C2 — Liu Hui Polygon-Doubling π Convergence
entries.description: Inscribed n-gon sequence π_n is monotone increasing and bounded above by π, hence convergent. Skeleton with tagged sorry deferring to MCT.

entries.title: R4-I1 — Madhava Alternating-Series Bound
entries.description: Generic Madhava-Leibniz remainder: |Σ_{n=0}^{N} a_n - L| ≤ a_{N+1} for monotone-decreasing alternating series.

entries.title: TH-COMP — Robustness Under Adversarial Composition
entries.description: If S₁ is (δ,ε₁)-robust and S₂ is (ε₁,ε₂)-robust, then S₁∘S₂ is (δ,ε₂)-robust. Zero axiom, zero sorry.

entries.title: TH6 — DPI Receipt-Chain Entropy Bound
entries.description: Elementary Cover-Thomas DPI (Theorem 2.8.1). NOT the Bekenstein physical bound (F1-4 retraction documented in CHANGELOG). Receipt chain H(X|Z) ≤ H(X|Y) for Markov chain X→Y→Z.

entries.title: TH6-MERKLE — Merkle DAG Height Bound
entries.description: leafCount ≤ B^height for B-ary Merkle tree; height ≤ log_B(leafCount). Structural log-height bound for receipt DAG.

entries.title: TH6-SCITT — SCITT Mask Entropy
entries.description: Entropy lower bound for SCITT receipt masks under DPI constraint.

entries.title: TH6-DPI — DPI Soundness (TH6 master theorem)
entries.description: Master DPI soundness theorem tying receipt chain to entropy monotonicity.

entries.title: TH-SHANNON — Doctrine Shannon Code
entries.description: Doctrine alphabet has 4 labels; Shannon 2-bit code is optimal (H=2 bits for uniform source). Kraft equality holds.

entries.title: R2-G6 — Receipt Transduction Invariant
entries.description: For round-trip (g∘f = id), contentId is preserved. Complete proof, zero sorry. Khipu transcription analogy.

entries.title: TH-FEYNMAN — Feynman Citation Chain Length
entries.description: feynmanToSZLChain.length = 4 (Feynman → quantum → information → SZL). chain_citations_nonempty.

entries.title: TH-PATH-INTEGRAL — Feynman Path Integral Audit Sum
entries.description: Audit sum over all paths equals the Feynman path integral discretization. Largest file in repo (22KB).

entries.title: TH-GLEASON — Gleason Mod-8 Receipt Closure
entries.description: Doubly-even self-dual binary codes have length ≡ 0 (mod 8). SZL governance analog for 8-receipt closure invariant.

entries.title: TH-ADINKRA — Adinkra Gate Invariant
entries.description: Adinkra graph supersymmetry invariant for gate receipt topology.

entries.title: TH-WHEELER — Delayed Choice Closure
entries.description: Wheeler window safety: receipts outside admission window are rejected; closeLabel is a function of admission. Idempotent.

entries.title: TH-REIDEMEISTER — Reidemeister Conjecture (Knot Calculus)
entries.description: Three audit-Reidemeister rewrites R1 (repack), R2 (commute), R3 (associativity). CONJECTURE status; all sorry-tagged; target v16.

entries.title: TH-SBOM — SBOM Component Λ-Receipt Provenance
entries.description: SBOM-component receipt total-order and dual-witness drift theorems. P1-IQT-SBOM-SUM-IS-NOT-HASH remediated (uses HMAC not arithmetic sum).

entries.title: TH-DOCTRINE-CROSS — Cross-Component Invariant
entries.description: Doctrine v6 cross-component invariant: all subsystems share the same Λ gate contract.

entries.title: TH-PUBLIC-CLAIMS — Public Claims Inventory
entries.description: Authoritative source of truth for all publicly-claimed Lean theorems. Each entry maps (Lean theorem, runtime counterpart, doctrine doc citation).

entries.title: TH-V18-01 — Agent Loop Termination
entries.description: Under DPI-bounded turn budget b, Λ-gated agent state machine reaches Done in finitely many steps. Pure structural termination on Nat. Zero axiom.

entries.title: TH-V18-01b — Lambda Monotonicity
entries.description: Λ-gate monotonicity restatement as v18 module theorem.

entries.title: TH-V18-02 — DoctrineLabel Fintype
entries.description: DoctrineLabel has exactly 4 elements as a Fintype. Prerequisite for TH-V18-03 Kraft inequality.

entries.title: TH-V18-03 — Kraft Inequality for Doctrine Shannon Code
entries.description: 4 codewords × 2^(-2) = 1. Code is Shannon-optimal for uniform 4-symbol source. Proof by norm_num.

entries.title: TH-V18-04 — Egyptian Weight Sum
entries.description: Egyptian unit-fraction weights sum to 1: Σ_{i=1}^k (1/k) = 1.

entries.title: TH-V18-05 — Receipt Transduction
entries.description: Transduction preserves receipt content integrity under encode-decode round-trip.

entries.title: TH-V18-06 — Brahmi Axis Option
entries.description: Brahmi positional-zero gate: AxisOption none represents the zero-axis identity element.

entries.title: TH-V18-07 — Feynman Citation Chain
entries.description: Citation chain from Feynman diagrams to SZL receipt audit has length ≥ 1.

entries.title: TH-V18-08 — Khipu Checksum Invariant
entries.description: Khipu receipt tree checksum invariant as v18 thesis module. Derives from TH11.

entries.title: TH-V18-09 — Permutation Invariance
entries.description: Λ is invariant under permutation of axes: Λ(σ(x)) = Λ(x) for any σ ∈ Sym(k).

entries.title: TH-V18-10 — List Sum Invariant
entries.description: List.sum is preserved under the khipu encoding map. Structural induction.

entries.title: TH-V18-11 — Pareto Archive Finite Stabilization
entries.description: Non-decreasing bounded Nat sequence stabilizes. Classically true; deferred to Nat.find with decidable predicate. TRACKED.

entries.title: TH-V18-12 — Lambda Product Formula
entries.description: Λ_k product formula: (∏ x_i)^(1/k) expressed as composition of ring operations.

entries.title: TH-V18-13 — DPI Bound Abstract
entries.description: Abstract DPI bound as v18 module, parameterized over receipt channel type.

entries.title: TH-V18-14 — SHA-256 Collision Resistance (A15)
entries.description: Documents A15 as OPEN PROBLEM (P ≠ NP assumption). Audit-integrity theorems proved conditional on A15. Honest axiom under B2 discipline.

entries.title: TH-V18-15 — Multi-Agent Fairness
entries.description: In cooperative multi-agent system with finite fuel per agent, the system terminates. Foundational liveness for v18.x MultiAgentOrchestrator.

entries.title: TH-V18-16 — Feynman Citation Integrity
entries.description: Citation integrity: feynman citation chain contains no duplicates and references are non-empty.

entries.title: TH-PAC-MONO — PAC-Bayes Bound Monotone in KL
entries.description: PAC-Bayes bound is monotone increasing in KL divergence.

entries.title: TH-PAC-NONVACUOUS — PAC-Bayes Nonvacuous Criterion
entries.description: pacBayesBound_nonvacuous_iff: bound is nonvacuous iff KL < n·(1 - risk)·log(1/δ) condition holds.

entries.title: TH-GRAPH-LAMBDA — GraphLambda GNN Governance Head
entries.description: GraphLambda GNN governance head: Λ-gate applied to graph-structured receipts.

entries.title: TH-DOCTRINE-ENTROPY — DoctrineV3 Measurability Honesty
entries.description: Measurability honesty: all doctrine labels are measurable under the sigma-algebra induced by Λ.

entries.title: TH-MORAL-GROUNDING — DoctrineV3 Moral Grounding
entries.description: Moral grounding: any doctrine-compliant agent satisfies the honesty + measurability constraints.

entries.title: TH-EGYPTIAN-AKHMIM — Akhmim Table
entries.description: Akhmim RMP 2/n table: unit-fraction decomposition of 2/n for odd n ≤ 101. Formal proof of table correctness.

entries.title: TH-HORUS-EYE — Horus Eye Dyadic Fractions
entries.description: Horus Eye dyadic: ancient Egyptian fractional representation Σ 2^(-i) for i ∈ {1,2,4,8,16,32}.

entries.title: TH-BRAHMI-AXIS — Brahmi Positional-Zero Axis
entries.description: Brahmi axis AxisOption models the positional-zero digit enabling subtraction completion.

entries.title: TH-SEXAGESIMAL — Sexagesimal Regular Numbers
entries.description: A positive integer n is sexagesimally regular iff n | 60^k for some k. Babylonian table of reciprocals is regular.

entries.title: TH-RELAY-CHAIN — Qhapaq Ñan Relay Chain
entries.description: Inca relay-runner (chasqui) chain: message propagates through relay stations preserving content identity.

entries.title: TH-CRT — CRT Weight Chunking
entries.description: Chinese Remainder Theorem applied to receipt weight chunking: disjoint-modulus chunks reconstruct unique weight.

entries.title: TH-MATCHED-FILTER — Correlator Matched Filter
entries.description: Matched filter maximizes SNR for receipt correlator under AWGN.

entries.title: TH-HALT-ELIG — HUKLLA Halt Eligibility
entries.description: An agent is halt-eligible iff its receipt DAG is closed under DPI and all pending receipts have been acknowledged.

entries.title: TH-OVERWATCH — ReadOnly Gate
entries.description: OVERWATCH read-only gate: observation does not mutate receipt state.

entries.title: TH-QEC-CSS — CSS Quantum Error Correction Bridge
entries.description: CSS code bridge: classical codes C₁ ⊂ C₂ → valid CSS quantum code with distance ≥ min(d₁,d₂).

entries.title: TH-QEC-HAMMING — Hamming Foundations
entries.description: Hamming distance triangle inequality and sphere-packing bound for quantum receipt encoding.

entries.title: TH-QEC-KITAEV — Kitaev Surface Code
entries.description: Kitaev surface code toric boundary conditions: code distance scales as √n for n qubits.

entries.title: TH-QEC-SHOR — Shor Receipt Code
entries.description: Shor 9-qubit code structure applied to receipt encoding: corrects any single-qubit error.

entries.title: TH-LAMBDA-SCHUR — Schur-Concavity of Λ
entries.description: Λ_k is Schur-concave: for majorization x ≻ y, Λ(x) ≤ Λ(y). This captures fairness under redistribution.

entries.title: TH-LAMBDA-RING — Composition Ring
entries.description: Λ-gate composition forms a commutative semiring under pointwise product and max.

entries.title: TH-COMP-OVERHEAD — Composition Overhead Bound
entries.description: Composition overhead: adding k layers multiplies Λ gate latency by at most k·(1+ε).

entries.title: TH-COMP-TH1 — TH1 Composition Master
entries.description: TH1 composition master theorem: sequential Λ-gate composition preserves monotonicity and boundedness.

entries.title: TH-R1-TESTS — R1 Composition Tests
entries.description: Lean-level tests for R1 composition properties against reference vectors.

entries.title: TH-POSITION-AWARE — Position-Aware Gate
entries.description: Position-aware Λ gate: axis weight reflects ordinal position in receipt sequence.

entries.title: TH-TOPOLOGY-PH — Persistent Homology Chain
entries.description: Persistent homology chain for receipt topology: Betti numbers track connected components in audit DAG.

entries.title: TH-PRNG-K10 — K10v2 Replay Root
entries.description: K10v2 PRNG: deterministic replay root guarantees reproducible receipt seeding.

entries.title: TH8-GLR — Graded Linear Receipts
entries.description: Graded linear receipt semiring: receipts graded by trust level form a valid semiring.

entries.title: TH8-GRADED — Graded Semiring Structure
entries.description: Graded semiring of Λ-receipts indexed by trust level ∈ {0,1,2,3}.

entries.title: TH8-LINEAR — Linear Receipt
entries.description: Linear receipt module: receipt chain forms a free module over the Λ-semiring.

entries.title: TH8-MONAD — Strong Monad Identity
entries.description: Receipt monad satisfies strong monad identity laws (unit, associativity).

entries.title: TH-TWO-WITNESS — Kochen-Specker 18-Vector NCHV Soundness
entries.description: TH KS-18: 18-vector Kochen-Specker proof that no non-contextual hidden-variable model exists in ℝ³.

entries.title: TH-REF-VECTORS — Reference Vector Parity
entries.description: Lean Float Λ implementation matches TypeScript runtime on curated reference vectors in reference-vectors.json.
